description: One-document native DocRED ablation with whole-document structured relation instances, relation-only contrastive Layer 2 enrichment, exact endpoint Layer 4 resolution, ontology/type validation, and full Layer 0-12 artifacts. No src changes or direct extraction fallback.

chunking.context_safety_note: Notebook keeps the whole document in one chunk when safe.

layer06_concept_relation_induction.description: Existing deterministic NeoOLAF strategy; consumes only native candidates/triples.

relations.allowed_inventory_location: input task_guidance + seed ontology; not injected as mention-free candidates

based in: located in the administrative territorial entity
greek: original language of film or TV show
metropolitan area: located in the administrative territorial entity
